project_type: React board game SPA with TypeScript, Vite, Zustand state management
test_command: npx tsc -b (type-checking only, no tests exist)
verification_instructions: 1. Run npx tsc -b to verify no type errors. 2. Run npx vite build to verify the bundle compiles. 3. Verify season card arrays and deck building logic handles all groups correctly.
environment_constraints: No test framework installed. Verification via TypeScript compilation and Vite build only.
key_patterns: Zustand store in src/store/gameStore.ts with actions that call pure functions from src/utils/gameLogic.ts. Types/constants in src/types/game.ts. Components in src/components/. Game state flows: createInitialGameState() -> setupSeason() -> phase transitions via advancePhase(). The createGame store action calls createInitialGameState and currently only passes player names/clans. Season cards are defined as constants (SPRING_CARDS, SUMMER_CARDS, AUTUMN_CARDS) in game.ts with group field indicating which deck they belong to.
directory_structure: src/types/game.ts (types + card data constants), src/utils/gameLogic.ts (pure game logic functions), src/store/gameStore.ts (Zustand store with UI actions), src/components/ (React components), public/ (static assets)
